proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with mCRPC (mcrpc=1) have shorter pfs_months than those without (mcrpc=0).
Patients with visceral metastases (visceral_mets=1) have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 3.706 (visceral_mets=1, n=9973) vs 3.754 (visceral_mets=0, n=40027); diff=-0.048, t=-2.11, p=0.0345
OLS pfs_months ~ ecog_ps: coef[ecog_ps]=-1.1606, p=0, n=50000, R^2=0.1509

proposed_hypotheses.text: Bone metastases (bone_mets=1) are associated with shorter pfs_months than no bone mets.
Liver metastases (liver_mets=1) are associated with shorter pfs_months than no liver mets.
A higher count of metastatic sites (bone+visceral+liver+adrenal) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 3.753 (bone_mets=1, n=10056) vs 3.742 (bone_mets=0, n=39944); diff=0.011, t=0.49, p=0.624
Mean pfs_months: 3.743 (liver_mets=1, n=7392) vs 3.744 (liver_mets=0, n=42608); diff=-0.002, t=-0.07, p=0.948
OLS pfs_months ~ met_count: coef[met_count]=-0.0043, p=0.727, n=50000, R^2=0.0000

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher baseline psa_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher gleason_score is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Log-transformed PSA shows a stronger linear association with pfs_months than raw PSA.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r(psa_ng_ml, pfs_months)=-0.1532, p=3.48e-260, n=50000
OLS pfs_months ~ gleason_score: coef[gleason_score]=-0.0062, p=0.486, n=50000, R^2=0.0000
Pearson r(log_psa, pfs_months)=-0.2311, p=0, n=50000

proposed_hypotheses.text: Lower albumin_g_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Lower hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r(albumin_g_dl, pfs_months)=0.1226, p=1.47e-166, n=50000
Pearson r(ldh_u_l, pfs_months)=-0.0167, p=0.000181, n=50000
Pearson r(alkaline_phosphatase_u_l, pfs_months)=-0.0121, p=0.00663, n=50000
Pearson r(hemoglobin_g_dl, pfs_months)=-0.0102, p=0.0225, n=50000

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r(crp_mg_l, pfs_months)=-0.0030, p=0.507, n=50000
Pearson r(nlr, pfs_months)=0.0025, p=0.577, n=50000
Pearson r(weight_loss_pct_6mo, pfs_months)=-0.1427, p=9.91e-226, n=50000

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r(pain_nrs, pfs_months)=-0.0012, p=0.797, n=50000
Pearson r(fatigue_grade, pfs_months)=0.0020, p=0.656, n=50000
Pearson r(appetite_loss_grade, pfs_months)=-0.0005, p=0.914, n=50000

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide have longer pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_abiraterone have longer pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_docetaxel have longer pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have longer pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma have longer pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have longer pfs_months than those who do not.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 3.728 (treatment_enzalutamide=1, n=20076) vs 3.755 (treatment_enzalutamide=0, n=29924); diff=-0.026, t=-1.43, p=0.153
Mean pfs_months: 3.740 (treatment_abiraterone=1, n=14991) vs 3.746 (treatment_abiraterone=0, n=35009); diff=-0.006, t=-0.28, p=0.776
Mean pfs_months: 3.732 (treatment_docetaxel=1, n=15187) vs 3.749 (treatment_docetaxel=0, n=34813); diff=-0.017, t=-0.88, p=0.381
Mean pfs_months: 3.829 (treatment_olaparib=1, n=5098) vs 3.735 (treatment_olaparib=0, n=44902); diff=0.094, t=2.94, p=0.00329
Mean pfs_months: 3.741 (treatment_lu177_psma=1, n=7504) vs 3.745 (treatment_lu177_psma=0, n=42496); diff=-0.004, t=-0.16, p=0.872
Mean pfs_months: 3.805 (treatment_pembrolizumab=1, n=2384) vs 3.741 (treatment_pembrolizumab=0, n=47616); diff=0.064, t=1.49, p=0.137

proposed_hypotheses.text: BRCA2 mutation carriers (brca2_mutation=1) have different pfs_months than non-carriers.
AR-V7 positive patients (ar_v7_positive=1) have shorter pfs_months than AR-V7 negative.
MSI-high patients (msi_high=1) have different pfs_months than MSI-stable.
PSMA-high patients (psma_high=1) have different pfs_months than PSMA-low.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 3.835 (brca2_mutation=1, n=4996) vs 3.734 (brca2_mutation=0, n=45004); diff=0.100, t=3.08, p=0.00205
Mean pfs_months: 3.734 (ar_v7_positive=1, n=10038) vs 3.747 (ar_v7_positive=0, n=39962); diff=-0.013, t=-0.55, p=0.58
Mean pfs_months: 3.778 (msi_high=1, n=1528) vs 3.743 (msi_high=0, n=48472); diff=0.035, t=0.65, p=0.515
Mean pfs_months: 3.752 (psma_high=1, n=29962) vs 3.732 (psma_high=0, n=20038); diff=0.020, t=1.10, p=0.273

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within BRCA2 mutation carriers, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months than no olaparib.
Within BRCA2 wild-type patients, treatment_olaparib has minimal/no benefit on pfs_months.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_olaparib and brca2_mutation on pfs_months (olaparib benefit larger in BRCA2 carriers).

analyses.result_summary: Within brca2_mutation=1: pfs_months 5.216 on treatment_olaparib=1 (n=529) vs 3.671 off (n=4467); diff=1.545, p=3.95e-27
Within brca2_mutation=0: pfs_months 3.668 on treatment_olaparib=1 (n=4569) vs 3.742 off (n=40435); diff=-0.073, p=0.0191
Interaction treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation: coef=1.6188, p=4.33e-61; main treatment_olaparib=-0.073 (p=0.0199), main brca2_mutation=-0.071 (p=0.0265)

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within MSI-high patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.
Within MSI-stable patients, treatment_pembrolizumab does not improve pfs_months.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and msi_high on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Within msi_high=1: pfs_months 3.527 on treatment_pembrolizumab=1 (n=79) vs 3.792 off (n=1449); diff=-0.265, p=0.239
Within msi_high=0: pfs_months 3.814 on treatment_pembrolizumab=1 (n=2305) vs 3.739 off (n=46167); diff=0.075, p=0.0864
Interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high: coef=-0.3401, p=0.153; main treatment_pembrolizumab=0.075 (p=0.083), main msi_high=0.052 (p=0.333)

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within PSMA-high patients, treatment_lu177_psma is associated with longer pfs_months than no Lu177-PSMA.
Within PSMA-low patients, treatment_lu177_psma does not improve pfs_months.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_lu177_psma and psma_high on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Within psma_high=1: pfs_months 3.743 on treatment_lu177_psma=1 (n=4486) vs 3.754 off (n=25476); diff=-0.011, p=0.736
Within psma_high=0: pfs_months 3.737 on treatment_lu177_psma=1 (n=3018) vs 3.731 off (n=17020); diff=0.006, p=0.874
Interaction treatment_lu177_psma:psma_high: coef=-0.0174, p=0.737; main treatment_lu177_psma=0.006 (p=0.874), main psma_high=0.023 (p=0.256)

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within AR-V7 positive patients, treatment_enzalutamide is associated with shorter or equal pfs_months compared to no enzalutamide (i.e., reduced benefit relative to AR-V7 negative).
Within AR-V7 negative patients, treatment_enzalutamide is associated with longer pfs_months than no enzalutamide.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_enzalutamide and ar_v7_positive on pfs_months (less benefit in AR-V7 positive).
There is a negative interaction between treatment_abiraterone and ar_v7_positive on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Within ar_v7_positive=1: pfs_months 3.719 on treatment_enzalutamide=1 (n=4019) vs 3.744 off (n=6019); diff=-0.024, p=0.557
Within ar_v7_positive=0: pfs_months 3.731 on treatment_enzalutamide=1 (n=16057) vs 3.757 off (n=23905); diff=-0.027, p=0.193
Interaction treatment_enzalutamide:ar_v7_positive: coef=0.0025, p=0.957; main treatment_enzalutamide=-0.027 (p=0.194), main ar_v7_positive=-0.014 (p=0.641)
Interaction treatment_abiraterone:ar_v7_positive: coef=0.0476, p=0.334; main treatment_abiraterone=-0.015 (p=0.492), main ar_v7_positive=-0.027 (p=0.32)

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a different pfs_months effect of treatment_docetaxel between patients with and without visceral_mets (interaction).
Within mCRPC patients, treatment_docetaxel is associated with longer pfs_months than no docetaxel.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_docetaxel:visceral_mets: coef=0.0516, p=0.294; main treatment_docetaxel=-0.027 (p=0.213), main visceral_mets=-0.063 (p=0.0197)
Within mcrpc=1: pfs_months 3.524 on treatment_docetaxel=1 (n=8394) vs 3.503 off (n=19087); diff=0.021, p=0.426

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age (age_years) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories.
pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories (e.g., medicaid/uninsured worse than private/medicare).
Patients with rural_residence=1 have shorter pfs_months than urban (rural_residence=0).

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r(age_years, pfs_months)=0.8555, p=0, n=50000
ANOVA pfs by race_ethnicity: F=0.564, p=0.689, group means={'asian': 3.797, 'black': 3.741, 'hispanic': 3.737, 'other': 3.749, 'white': 3.741}
ANOVA pfs by insurance_type: F=0.344, p=0.794, group means={'medicaid': 3.741, 'medicare': 3.754, 'private': 3.736, 'uninsured': 3.726}
Mean pfs_months: 3.756 (rural_residence=1, n=9942) vs 3.741 (rural_residence=0, n=40058); diff=0.015, t=0.67, p=0.504

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with chronic_kidney_disease=1 have shorter pfs_months than without.
Patients with heart_failure=1 have shorter pfs_months than without.
Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have shorter pfs_months than without.
Patients with prior_malignancy=1 have shorter pfs_months than without.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with prior_chemotherapy=1 have shorter pfs_months than chemo-naive.
Longer years_since_diagnosis is associated with shorter pfs_months (more advanced/treated disease).

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r(prior_lines_of_therapy, pfs_months)=-0.0057, p=0.205, n=50000
Mean pfs_months: 3.739 (prior_chemotherapy=1, n=22453) vs 3.749 (prior_chemotherapy=0, n=27547); diff=-0.010, t=-0.54, p=0.592
Pearson r(years_since_diagnosis, pfs_months)=-0.0006, p=0.897, n=50000

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adjusted for ECOG, mCRPC, visceral_mets, log_psa, ldh, albumin, the coefficient for treatment_olaparib remains positive (longer pfs_months).
Adjusted for the same prognostic covariates, the coefficient for treatment_lu177_psma remains positive.
Adjusted for the same prognostic covariates, the coefficient for treatment_pembrolizumab is small/non-significant overall (effect concentrated in MSI-high).

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ olaparib + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + age_years
analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + age_years: coef[treatment_olaparib]=0.1403, p=1.79e-94, n=50000, R^2=0.9485

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, ldh, albumin, the interaction treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation remains positive and significant on pfs_months.
After adjustment, the interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high remains positive and significant on pfs_months.
After adjustment, the interaction treatment_lu177_psma:psma_high remains positive and significant on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib + brca2_mutation + treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + age_years: coef[treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation]=1.4517, p=0, n=50000, R^2=0.9534

OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + msi_high + treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + age_years: coef[treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high]=-0.0290, p=0.592, n=50000, R^2=0.9481

OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_lu177_psma + psma_high + treatment_lu177_psma:psma_high + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + age_years: coef[treatment_lu177_psma:psma_high]=-0.0078, p=0.51, n=50000, R^2=0.9481

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, the interaction treatment_enzalutamide:ar_v7_positive on pfs_months is negative and significant (smaller benefit in AR-V7 positive).
After adjustment, the interaction treatment_abiraterone:ar_v7_positive on pfs_months is negative and significant.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_enzalutamide + ar_v7_positive + treatment_enzalutamide:ar_v7_positive + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + age_years: coef[treatment_enzalutamide:ar_v7_positive]=0.0020, p=0.852, n=50000, R^2=0.9481

OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_abiraterone + ar_v7_positive + treatment_abiraterone:ar_v7_positive + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + age_years: coef[treatment_abiraterone:ar_v7_positive]=0.0075, p=0.504, n=50000, R^2=0.9481

proposed_hypotheses.text: The proportion of BRCA2-mutated patients receiving treatment_olaparib differs across race_ethnicity categories.
The proportion of MSI-high patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab differs across race_ethnicity categories.
After adjusting for major prognostic factors, race_ethnicity remains associated with pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Receipt of treatment_lu177_psma among PSMA-high patients differs by insurance_type.
Receipt of treatment_olaparib among BRCA2 carriers differs by insurance_type.
After adjusting for prognostic factors, insurance_type is associated with pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: snp_rs1045642 is associated with pfs_months.
snp_rs429358 (APOE) is associated with pfs_months.
Across many tested SNPs, the proportion of significant associations approximates the 5% nominal type-I rate (most SNPs are noise).

analyses.result_summary: Tested 25 SNPs as continuous predictors of pfs; fraction p<0.05 = 0.040 (expected ~0.05 under null).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The differential benefit of olaparib in BRCA2 carriers vs non-carriers (difference in difference) is at least 1 month of pfs_months.
The differential benefit of pembrolizumab in MSI-high vs MSI-stable patients is at least 1 month of pfs_months.
The differential benefit of lu177_psma in PSMA-high vs PSMA-low patients is at least 1 month of pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: DiD on pfs (treat=treatment_olaparib, biomarker=brca2_mutation): brca2_mutation=1 effect=1.545; brca2_mutation=0 effect=-0.073; DiD=1.619, interaction p=4.33e-61
DiD on pfs (treat=treatment_pembrolizumab, biomarker=msi_high): msi_high=1 effect=-0.265; msi_high=0 effect=0.075; DiD=-0.340, interaction p=0.153
DiD on pfs (treat=treatment_lu177_psma, biomarker=psma_high): psma_high=1 effect=-0.011; psma_high=0 effect=0.006; DiD=-0.017, interaction p=0.737

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving any 'biomarker-matched' therapy (olaparib if BRCA2+, pembro if MSI-high, lu177-PSMA if PSMA-high) have longer pfs_months than patients who received those therapies without the corresponding biomarker.
Within patients receiving treatment_olaparib, BRCA2 carriers have longer pfs_months than BRCA2 wild-type.
Within patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab, MSI-high patients have longer pfs_months than MSI-stable.
Within patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma, PSMA-high patients have longer pfs_months than PSMA-low.

analyses.result_summary: Among recipients of olaparib/pembro/lu177, biomarker-matched n=5046 mean pfs=3.873 vs unmatched n=9297 mean pfs=3.720; diff=0.153, p=3.75e-05

analyses.code: ttest pfs by brca2 within olaparib
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 5.216 (olaparib+ brca2+, n=529) vs 3.668 (olaparib+ brca2-, n=4569); diff=1.548, t=11.38, p=3.05e-27

analyses.code: ttest pfs by msi_high within pembro
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 3.527 (pembro+ msi_high+, n=79) vs 3.814 (pembro+ msi_high-, n=2305); diff=-0.288, t=-1.30, p=0.196

analyses.code: ttest pfs by psma_high within lu177

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable OLS model including disease severity (ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, log_psa, ldh, albumin), all six treatments, and the three biomarker×targeted-treatment interactions (olaparib×BRCA2, pembro×MSI-high, lu177×PSMA-high), each interaction term remains positive and significant on pfs_months while the AR-V7×enzalutamide interaction remains negative.
In the same multivariable model, ecog_ps coefficient is negative and significant; albumin coefficient is positive and significant.

analyses.result_summary: In integrated model, treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation: coef=1.4515, p=0 (R^2=0.9534, n=50000)
In integrated model, treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high: coef=-0.0159, p=0.757 (R^2=0.9534, n=50000)
In integrated model, treatment_lu177_psma:psma_high: coef=-0.0027, p=0.811 (R^2=0.9534, n=50000)
In integrated model, treatment_enzalutamide:ar_v7_positive: coef=-0.0001, p=0.994 (R^2=0.9534, n=50000)
In integrated model, ecog_ps: coef=-1.1512, p=0 (R^2=0.9534, n=50000)
In integrated model, albumin_g_dl: coef=0.4797, p=0 (R^2=0.9534, n=50000)
